ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "physical_address_number" INTEGER /* Physical address number */,
  "physical_address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "physical_city" TEXT /* Physical city */,
  "physical_state" TEXT /* Physical state */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the business's website */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the business was founded */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., open, closed, temporarily closed) */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., LLC, Corporation, Sole Proprietorship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the subcategory icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_details" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the business */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the business */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to social media profiles */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON object containing amenities offered by the business */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine (for restaurants) */,
  "payment_methods" TEXT /* JSON object containing accepted payment methods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, business owner, general user) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., external API, user input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the area */,
  "educational_level" TEXT /* Educational level of the area (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing age distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object containing ethnicity distribution data */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the area */,
  "housing_costs" REAL /* Average housing costs in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_demographics" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the area */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* JSON object representing the boundary coordinates of the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "area_size_km2" REAL /* Size of the area in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_geographic_areas" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_categories_businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_subcategories_businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_external_data" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON object containing data from the external source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "source_id")
)
